title: 2026 Oscars Best Supporting Actor Prediction
text: Sean Penn is the frontrunner to win the Best Supporting Actor award at the 2026 Oscars for his villainous role in One Battle After Another. Stellan Skarsgard presents the strongest competition as the expected runner-up for his performance in Sentimental Value. Sean Penn holds the clear advantage with a 1.26x payout multiplier on PrizePicks Culture Picks. He has already captured the BAFTA and Screen Actors Guild Award in this category ahead of Sunday's ceremony. According to the article, Penn has received plenty of recognition at non-Oscar award ceremonies. Stellan Skarsgard follows with a 5.88x multiplier. The Swedish actor earned the Golden Globe for Best Supporting Actor in a Motion Picture. The piece notes that Skarsgard's first career Oscar nomination distinguishes him as the first actor to receive a Best Supporting Actor nomination for an international film. The prediction strongly favors Penn, noting that One Battle After Another is positioned as the Best Picture favorite and that Penn already possesses two Oscars to his name. However, the article acknowledges a slim chance the Academy elects to reward Skarsgard with his first win, though this would represent quite the surprise.
